subTitle: Taking a close look at artist Utamaro's iconic work, 'Woman with a Glass Noisemaker'.

title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
subTitle: Wildlife photographer Iwago Mitsuaki showcases the different skills of his craft and the secret to a kitty's heart. Iwago and the cast discuss the incredible bond between humans and cats.
